overall.description: Cinematic third-person game footage of a samurai warrior in traditional armor and straw hat standing on a wooden mountain overlook, gazing out at a vast autumn valley with golden forests and distant smoke plumes beneath dramatic storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden mountain viewpoint overlooking autumn valley

agents.ego_description: samurai stands motionless on wooden platform, surveying the distant landscape with smoke rising from the valley below

entered.detail: thick wooden structural post of the viewing platform with visible grain and weathering
traditional wooden deck floor and railing of the mountain overlook
dark smoke rising from multiple points in the distant valley, suggesting fires or battle
dense forest canopy with vibrant golden and orange autumn foliage covering the rolling hills
dramatic dark grey storm clouds filling the sky with patches of lighter clouds

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands on a traditional wooden mountain overlook, surrounded by weathered wooden beams and railings. The vast autumn valley stretches below with dense golden forests, while dark storm clouds gather overhead and distant smoke plumes rise from the landscape, suggesting conflict or destruction in the valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze from a weathered mountain sanctuary across a vast, war-torn autumn valley. It begins with the camera positioned behind a samurai standing on a traditional wooden overlook, framed by aged beams and railings. As the perspective lingers, the view expands to reveal dense golden forests stretching toward the horizon under a heavy canopy of dark storm clouds. The scene then shifts focus toward the distance, where thin plumes of smoke rise from the landscape, signaling conflict within the valley below.
